summary: Comprehensive testing of StoryMe MVP - personalized storybook generator. All 15 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend form validation, image upload, PDF generation, and download flow all working correctly. Core functionality of uploading child photo, face detection/extraction, and generating personalized 10-page PDF storybook is fully functional.
passed_tests: Backend: API connectivity (GET /api/)
Backend: Missing name validation (422 response)
Backend: Missing image validation (422 response)
Backend: Invalid file type validation (400 response)
Backend: Empty/whitespace name validation (400 response)
Backend: Successful PDF generation with valid inputs
Backend: PDF page count validation (11 pages: 1 title + 10 story)
Backend: PDF name personalization in title page
Backend: Multiple names batch testing
Backend: Download headers validation (application/pdf)
Backend: Face detection with face-like image
Backend: Center-crop fallback with no-face image
Backend: GET /api/stories - list stories
Backend: GET /api/stories/0 - get story by index
Backend: GET /api/stories/999 - invalid index returns 404
Backend: GET /api/stories/verify/forest_of_smiles - template verification
Frontend: Page loads with correct title 'StoryMe - Create Personalized Storybooks'
Frontend: StoryMe header visible
Frontend: Story generation card visible
Frontend: Child name input visible and functional
Frontend: Photo upload input functional
Frontend: Generate story button visible and clickable
Frontend: Form validation - error toast on empty submit
Frontend: Image preview after upload
Frontend: Remove photo button functional
Frontend: Loading state during PDF generation
Frontend: Success message with download button after generation
Frontend: Create Another Story button resets form
Frontend: PDF download (5MB, 11 pages) works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: OpenCV Haar Cascade face detection is properly integrated in image_service.py
Fallback to center-crop when no face detected works correctly
Name overlay on page images uses proper font with white outline for readability
PDF generation uses ReportLab with proper page structure
Frontend properly handles blob response and triggers download
seed_data_creation: None required - uses static story templates
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: POST /api/generate returns valid 11-page PDF (1 title + 10 story pages), GET /api/stories returns story list, face detection uses OpenCV Haar Cascade with center-crop fallback, name is overlaid on page images (not extractable PDF text). Frontend form validation, image upload preview, PDF generation with loading state, and download all functional. Test files in /app/tests/backend/ can be reused for regression testing.

features_verified.Face extraction uses OpenCV Haar Cascade: PASS - Integrated in image_service.py extract_face() method
features_verified.Fallback to center-crop when no face det: PASS - Logs warning and uses center crop
features_verified.Frontend form submits correctly and rece: PASS - axios POST with responseType blob
